# Kelvin Maina — Portfolio

> Kelvin Maina is an Enterprise Software Engineer and Co-Founder based in Croatia/Kenya.

## About

Kelvin Maina is a seasoned software architect and engineer focused on building high-resilience, enterprise-grade systems. He is currently employed at Tokić (Croatia) and is co-founder of Zuribyte.

His work consistently reduces manual workload and processing times by over 60%, enabling teams to scale with fewer resources.

## Skills

- Enterprise Architecture and System Design
- Business Process Automation and RPA
- AI / ML document processing and OCR pipelines
- DevOps: Jenkins, Docker, Nginx, GitHub Actions
- Backend: Python, Django, REST APIs, Microservices
- Frontend: Next.js, React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS
- Databases: PostgreSQL, MySQL, Redis
- Cloud: Azure
- Version control: Git, GitHub

## Projects at Tokić

- **Travel Management Web App** — Full-stack system for employee business travel requests, approvals, and reporting.
- **Ticketing System (ACC & Fleet)** — Issue tracking and fleet operations management for Croatian operations.
- **Payroll Management System** — Automated HR payroll with accounting integrations and compliance reporting.
- **Employee Onboarding System** — End-to-end HR workflows with identity and access management provisioning.
- **AI Document Routing** — OCR pipeline integrated with DMS for intelligent document classification and routing.
- **RPA Scripts & Automations** — Robotic process automation for admin and finance tasks, reducing effort by 60%+.

## Projects at Zuribyte

- **Kuanasi** — Luxury fashion brand and e-commerce storefront in Belgium.
- **Dobroafrica** — Cross-border fashion e-tail platform for the Croatian market.
- **Olailepomara** — Tourism platform connecting travellers with experiences across Kenya.
